title: Greatness
description: A mod that adds many different melee weapons to Minecraft: Java Edition. I made it with my friend omar.diabolic.
body:
# Greatness
## NEW UPDATES!
### Changelog:
Added the Chakram (weapon)
Added Infection (enchantment)
Added Quickslash (enchantment)
Added Reach (enchantment)
Tweaked mechanics of all items (except Greataxe) to resemble vanilla sword more
Tweaked mechanics of Greataxe to resemble vanilla axe more

NOTE: The wiki is **incomplete**, it will be finished in 1.0.2. Originally it was 1.0.1, but we did not want to delay the next update.

NOTE 2: The poll has reached a conclusion and 1.0.3 will now get certain updates and changes according to result.

# **What is Greatness**

A mod that adds melee weapons from real-life into Minecraft: Java Edition. This mod includes weapons such as the greataxe, longsword, greatsword, scythe, dagger, club, Katana, and machete. It also includes crafting recipes for these items and all the weapons metioned support all ores.
